roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATIONS #1, #2, #3, #4 AND #5/3000REIN/PAJ: 100 DAYS/X: WITH NO TIME LOST/VD: 12-14-18 PROBABLE CAUSE HRG/4019HALF/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 12 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED//X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: NO PAROLE AGENT  APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS/NB/X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS NO WAIVED FORPROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PRE HEARING  CONFERENCE ON 12-07-18/
